name: Truman Director
description: LLM-directed tick-based town simulator. The world tool exposes init | tick | inject_event; agent decisions are produced by the host LLM via sampling.
_comment: Publish/dev metadata (slug/name/version/executa_type) is read by `anna-app apps publish`; tool_id/type/enabled/distribution are read by `anna-app dev` and the Agent. The distribution block mirrors the official anna-app-focus-flow reference: `active: binary` so the Agent installs a self-contained PyInstaller binary per platform; `supports_protocol: true` lets the Agent negotiate the JSON-RPC protocol on the spawned child. Archives are built by .github/workflows/release-binary.yml (tag truman-director-v<version>); each archive ships bin/<tool_id>[.exe] + manifest.json (forum topic 140), so every entrypoint carries the bin/ prefix (and .exe on windows). Run `python scripts/set-tool-id.py apply --tool <minted>` to rewrite the minted tool_id across pyproject.toml, executa.json and bundle/app.js once you mint one at https://anna.partners/executa. This dir is the `truman-director` handle referenced by app.json#bundled_executas.
